summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PredictPod strategy management features. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend authentication integration has critical issues preventing full UI testing despite credentials being correct.

critical_bugs.issue: Frontend login form not properly using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL environment variable
critical_bugs.details: Login attempts are being sent to localhost:3000/api/auth/login (404) instead of localhost:8001/api/auth/login. Despite REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL being set correctly in .env, the frontend is not using it for authentication calls.

critical_bugs.issue: Authentication state not persisting across page navigation
critical_bugs.details: Even when JWT tokens are manually stored in localStorage, the authentication state does not persist and users get redirected back to login page.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access Strategy Command Center due to authentication barrier
integration_issues.details: All strategy management features are blocked by frontend authentication issues, preventing testing of Create Strategy, Clone Strategy, and strategy cards functionality.

passed_tests: GET /api/user-strategies - List all strategies (found 11 strategies including 6 user-created)
GET /api/user-strategies/base-models - Retrieved 5 base model templates successfully
POST /api/user-strategies - Created new strategy successfully with config overrides
GET /api/user-strategies/{id} - Retrieved individual strategy by ID with full details
PUT /api/user-strategies/{id} - Updated strategy name, description, and enabled status
POST /api/user-strategies/{id}/clone - Cloned existing strategy with new name and config
POST /api/auth/login - Authentication API returns valid JWT tokens (tested via curl)
JSON config file generation in /app/backend/strategies/configs/generated/ - 13 config files generated correctly
Strategy config validation - JSON structure matches expected schema with all required fields
Test user creation and credential validation - predictpod@example.com user exists with correct password

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All strategy management APIs working perfectly including CRUD operations
success_percentage.frontend: 0% - Unable to test UI due to authentication system issues
success_percentage.integration: 20% - Backend-to-file integration works, frontend-to-backend blocked by auth

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL FRONTEND AUTHENTICATION BUG: The frontend is not properly using the REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL environment variable for authentication calls. Login attempts go to localhost:3000 instead of localhost:8001, resulting in 404 errors. Need to fix: 1) AuthContext to properly use backend URL for all auth calls, 2) Session persistence and token validation, 3) Ensure all API calls use correct backend URL. Backend APIs are fully functional - issue is frontend configuration only.
